word: H3755 - כֹּרֵם - kôrêm - ko-rame' - Vine dresser

sections.paragraph:
Original: כּרם

Transliteration: kôrêm

Phonetic: ko-rame'

BDB Definition:

  1. to tend vines or vineyards, to dress vines or vineyards
    1. (Qal) vinedressers (participle)

Origin: act. participle of an imaginary denominative from H3754

TWOT entry: 1040

Part(s) of speech: Verb
